title: Include Shareable Links in API
excerpt:
Hi team, 
Would it be possible to include the shareable link in the Board and Workdoc GraphQL schema? I currently see a “url” field but that’s the workspace URL and so if the Board is being shared, that “url” still requi…

posts.author: ProductivityApps (Travis C)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi team,

Would it be possible to include the shareable link in the Board and Workdoc GraphQL schema? I currently see a “url” field but that’s the workspace URL and so if the Board is being shared, that “url” still requires us to log in.

GraphQL API

Boards

monday.com boards are where users input all of their data, making them one of the core platform components. Items (rows), groups (groups of rows), and columns comprise the board's structure, and the board's data is stored in items and their...

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ProductivityApps,

We’ve logged this as a feature request! Make sure to add your vote to the top of the page

Best,
Rachel
